title: Deva
subTitle: A police officer investigates the murder of his close friend. However, he suffers a traumatic accident that wipes away his memory, jeopardising the investigation.

title: Madhura Raja
subTitle: Raja, a lion-hearted don, heads to the village of Pambinthurthu to protect people from a local criminal and illegal liquor merchant, Nadeshan, who terrorises them.

title: Emergency
subTitle: The chain of incidents that transpired in the personal and professional of Indira Gandhi, a powerful politician and stateswoman in the history of India; is presented.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Hello Charlie
subTitle: Charlie, a young man, is tasked with transporting a gorilla to Diu, unaware that it is a fraudster in a costume. Chaos erupts after Charlie encounters a real gorilla on their journey.

title: Chatrapathi
subTitle: Separated from his family during a conflict, Shivaji, a refugee, embarks on a mission to reunite with his adopted family. However, he faces several challenges after his foster brother conspires against him.

title: Jawan
subTitle: Driven by a personal vendetta, a man sets out to rectify the wrongs in the society to keep a promise made years ago.

title: Dhamaal
subTitle: Four lazy friends learn about a hidden treasure in Goa and set out to find it. However, a police inspector learns about their plan and begins to pursue them.

subTitle: After some mysterious instances at a temple of historical significance, a detective visits the region to investigate and find out the truth behind the incidents.

subTitle: To succeed in the film industry, Myra chooses Bachchhan Paandey, a notorious hooligan, as the main focus of her new movie. Things get complicated when the gangster decides to act in the film.
